Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The CellDimensionsInPixelsFromFormat method returns the pixel dimensions of each encoded cell for the specified data format.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: static V2UInt32 CellDimensionsInPixelsFromFormat(SourceDataFormat dataFormat); static V2UInt32 CellDimensionsInPixelsFromFormat(DataFormat dataFormat);

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: The pixel dimensions of one compressed texture cell for the specified data format, or 1x1 for uncompressed formats.
